title: Coast FIRE Calculator — Stop Saving. Let Your Portfolio Coast to Retirement.
description: Find your Coast FIRE number — the exact portfolio size that lets your investments grow to full retirement without saving another dollar. Free Coast FIRE calculator. coast fire calculator · coast fire number · financial independence · retire early · stop saving retire
alt_text: Coast FIRE Calculator hero showing the Coast FIRE number — the portfolio target that lets you stop saving and coast to retirement.
